---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AngularJS Guardian
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

Describe the problem or pain point this feature would address.

**Example:**
"I'm frustrated when [...] because [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

**Example:**
"Add a configuration option that allows [...] so that [...]"

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe your specific use case for this feature.

**Example:**
"When testing applications with [...], I need to [...] so that [...]"

## Benefits

What benefits would this feature provide?

- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, share them here.

```javascript
// Example code or pseudocode
const newFeature = {
  option: 'value'
};
```

## Breaking Changes

Would this feature require breaking changes to existing functionality?

- [ ] Yes (explain what would break)
- [ ] No

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocking my usage
- [ ] High - Significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature hasn't been requested
- [ ] I have read the documentation
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
- [ ] I am willing to contribute this feature (optional)
